title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 262.060 - Manager and inspector
text:
262.060.  Manager and inspector. — Said manager and inspector shall be under the control of the board of regents of Southwest Missouri State University.
(RSMo 1939 § 14055) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12388; 1919 § 11958; 1909 § 619
